title: Red teamers turned Claude Desktop into a double agent to do their evil bidding
abstract: Red team operatives transformed Claude Desktop into a versatile cybersecurity sandbox for simulating and testing advanced threat scenarios.
abstract_zh: 听说有个牛逼的红帽小分队把Claude桌面变了个样，变成了一个能模拟各种高级威胁测试的大沙盒，简直是程序员们的福利神器！
